# COMP110 Data Analysis Project
##My Idea
I analyzed how study time relates to stress levels among students.
## Why I Chose This
This idea is valuable because it explores student well-being and academic habits.
## My Analysis
I looked at survey data and compared hours studies versus reported stress.
## Visualization
![Graph 1](static/imgs/graph1.png)
![Graph 2](static/imgs/graph2.png)

## Conclusion
There seems to be a moderate relationship between increased study time and higher stress.
